entry.title: Prompt-to-asset
entry.description: MCP server that generates production-ready visual assets by routing requests across 30+ image generation models. Handles app icons, favicons, OG images, logos, and wordmarks. Validates output for WCAG contrast and palette consistency. Zero API key required for first run via Pollinations and Stable Horde free tiers.
entry.seoTitle: Prompt-to-asset MCP Server for Claude Visual Assets
entry.seoDescription: Generate app icons, favicons, OG images, logos, and wordmarks from Claude with the Prompt-to-asset MCP server and 30+ image models.
entry.author: MohamedAbdallah-14
entry.cardDescription: Generate app icons, favicons, OG images, and logos via 30+ image models. No API key required for first run.
entry.usageSnippet: claude mcp add prompt-to-asset -- npx -y prompt-to-asset
entry.copySnippet: claude mcp add prompt-to-asset -- npx -y prompt-to-asset
entry.body:
## Overview

MCP server that generates production-ready visual assets by routing requests across 30+ image generation models. Handles app icons, favicons, OG images, logos, and wordmarks. Validates output for WCAG contrast and palette consistency. Zero API key required for first run via Pollinations and Stable Horde free tiers.

## Usage

claude mcp add prompt-to-asset -- npx -y prompt-to-asset
